allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\),str\) else ''\) for l in lines[-20:] if l]")

PowerShell($procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3800 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process -NoNewWindow node -ArgumentList "server.js" -RedirectStandardOutput "server.log" -RedirectStandardError "server_err.log"; Start-Sleep 2; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3800/api/leads -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"nombre":"Test","apellido":"Check","telefono":"+51 999 999 999","empresa":"Synopsis","cargo":"Tester","email":"test@synopsis.ws","terminos":"Si","marketing":"No"}')
